name: Agent Workforce OpenCode Native Subagent Bridge
description: Hybrid pilot that keeps AgentFlow runtime dispatch artifacts and attempts to record OpenCode native subagent bridge evidence without real LLM or CodeExecutor execution.
defaultConstraints: Do not call real LLM providers unless allowLLM is explicitly true.
Do not modify external project files.
Do not fabricate OpenCode native subagent task ids.
defaultOutput: Role Timeline with native dispatch status
